arts.ttl: Ben Doak CAN handle Scotland hype machine as Ryan Gauld tells him how after haunting Josko Gvardiol
arts.sum: Doak gave Man City star the runaround at Hampden as excitement levels over the Liverpool starlet hit fever pitch

arts.ttl: Netherlands vs Hungary halted due to medical emergency as Magyars relive Euro 2024 Scotland scare
arts.sum: It comes just months after Barnabas Varga suffered a sickening head injury against Scotland in a similar stoppage
